old_thesis: Valuation is high; consensus rating is Hold with average price target of $192.88 implying only 12.82% upside from $156.54. Bears highlight risk of competition and premium valuation.
new_thesis: Palantir is delivering ~70% revenue growth, ~80% EPS growth, 41% operating margin, and ~$760 million quarterly free cash flow. Commercial revenue is compounding triple-digits on the back of AIP, with large accounts scaling from single-digit to $20–$30 million.
what_changed: 最近一季度（2026-03-31）EPS超预期17.9%；营收低于预期9.8%；管理层给出4条前瞻指引，显示业务走向；公司类型已确认为HyperGrowth，估值方法已切换至EV/Revenue + Revenue Growth + FCF Margin
why_now: 股价仍低于分析师共识目标价17.4%，下次财报（2026-08-03）是预期差验证的关键节点。
